title: Login and reach dashboard
description: Verify login flow with real credentials and dashboard landing

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field labeled 'ID de Empresa' with the value 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field labeled 'Email' with the value admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field labeled 'Contraseña' with the value TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Verify the page contains the text 'Dashboard'

title: Login with wrong password shows error
description: Verify that invalid credentials show error and stay on login page

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field labeled 'ID de Empresa' with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field labeled 'Email' with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field labeled 'Contraseña' with wrongpassword123
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait 3 seconds, then verify the URL still contains /login
Verify an error message or toast notification is visible on the page

title: Register new company and land on dashboard
description: Register a brand new company and verify redirect to dashboard

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/register
Find the input field labeled 'RUC' and fill it with 20666777881
Find the input field labeled 'Razón Social' and fill it with FrontTest SAC
Find the input field labeled 'Nombre Comercial' and fill it with FrontTest
Find the input field labeled 'Dirección' and fill it with Av Frontend 123
Find the input field labeled 'Nombre Completo' and fill it with Test User
Find the input field labeled 'Email' and fill it with fronttest@test.pe
Find the input field for password and fill it with FrontTest2026!
Click the button with text 'Registrarse' or 'Crear Cuenta'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard

title: Dashboard shows KPI cards and charts
description: Verify dashboard loads with KPI summary cards and chart visualizations

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Wait 3 seconds for dashboard data to load from the API
Verify the page contains multiple card elements (at least 4 cards with data-slot='card' or class containing 'card')
Verify the page contains at least one SVG element with class containing 'recharts' which indicates a chart is rendered

title: Emit Factura with two items
description: Create a new Factura document with 2 items and verify the detail page shows the accepted document

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents/new
Wait 2 seconds for the form to load. The page has a select for document type, a select for series, and customer fields
In the document type select, choose the option 'Factura (01)'
Wait 1 second for the series dropdown to update, then select the first available series option
Find the input field for customer document number (labeled 'Número' or 'Nro. Documento') and fill it with 20100070970
Find the input field for customer name (labeled 'Nombre / Razón Social' or 'Nombre') and fill it with TestSprite Cliente SAC
In the items table, find the first row. Fill the description field with Servicio de consultoría
In the first item row, set quantity to 2
In the first item row, set unit price to 50
Click the button to add another item row (text 'Agregar Item' or '+' button below the items table)
In the second item row, fill description with Producto de prueba
In the second item row, set quantity to 1
In the second item row, set unit price to 100
Click the button with text 'Emitir Comprobante'
Wait up to 10 seconds. Verify the URL changes to contain /documents/ (the detail page) and the page shows the document number starting with F001-

title: Browse documents list with type filter
description: View documents list, apply type filter, and open a document detail

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents
Wait 3 seconds for the documents table to load
Verify a table with rows is displayed (at least 1 row in tbody)
Find the select dropdown labeled 'Tipo' and select 'Factura' option
Wait 2 seconds for filtered results to load
Click the first row in the table body to open document detail
Wait up to 5 seconds for the URL to change to contain /documents/ (detail page)

title: View document detail and download PDF
description: Open a document detail and verify metadata, items, and PDF download button works

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/documents
Wait 3 seconds then click the first row in the table body
Verify the detail page shows a document number (text matching pattern F001- or B001-)
Verify the page contains a button or link with text 'PDF' or 'Descargar PDF'
Verify the page contains a button or link with text 'XML' or 'Descargar XML'
Click the button with text 'Volver' to go back to documents list
Verify URL contains /documents

title: Navigate sidebar links and logout
description: Navigate through sidebar to Documents, Series, Dashboard, then logout

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Click the sidebar link with text 'Documentos'
Wait 3 seconds and verify URL contains /documents
Click the sidebar link with text 'Series'
Wait 3 seconds and verify URL contains /series
Click the sidebar link with text 'Usuarios'
Wait 3 seconds and verify URL contains /users
Click the sidebar link with text 'Dashboard'
Wait 3 seconds and verify URL contains /dashboard
Find and click the user menu button at the bottom of the sidebar (it shows the user name or has a chevron icon)
In the dropdown menu that appears, click 'Cerrar Sesión' or 'Cerrar sesión'
Wait up to 5 seconds for the URL to contain /login

title: Create new document series
description: Create a new Factura series and verify it appears in the table

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/series
Wait 3 seconds for the series page to load
Click the button with text 'Nueva Serie'
Wait 1 second for a dialog or form to appear
In the dialog, select document type 'Factura (01)' from the type dropdown
Find the input field for serie code and type FZ88 (4 characters, starts with F for Factura)
Click the submit or create button in the dialog
Wait 3 seconds and verify the series table contains a row with text FZ88

title: View series list with existing series
description: Navigate to series page and verify existing series F001, B001 are displayed

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84
Fill the second input field with admin@tukitest.pe
Fill the third input field with TestSprite2026!
Click the button with text 'Iniciar Sesión'
Wait up to 10 seconds for the URL to contain /dashboard
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/series
Wait 5 seconds for the series table data to fully load from the API
Verify the table body has at least 3 rows (F001, B001, FC01 exist)
Verify the page contains the text F001 somewhere in the table

title: Update company settings
description: Change company commercial name and address in settings

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the first input field with 0c700fd7-1fdb-43d5-a2a8-d20fe4bcab84

Navigate to http://localhost:3000/settings

Verify the page shows the text 20100070970 (the company RUC)
Find the input field labeled 'Nombre Comercial' and clear it, then type TestSprite Co
Find the input field labeled 'Dirección' and clear it, then type Av TestSprite 2026
Click the save button (text 'Guardar' or 'Guardar Cambios')
Verify a success toast or confirmation message appears within 5 seconds

title: Unauthenticated redirect to login
description: Verify accessing a protected route without auth redirects to login

steps.description: Navigate directly to http://localhost:3000/dashboard without logging in first (fresh browser, no cookies)
Wait up to 5 seconds. Verify the URL contains /login, confirming the user was redirected to the login page
